case_title: GUILIAN LUO VS. SCOTT DAVID DERRY ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUO, GUILIAN AS TO DEFENDANT DERRY, SCOTT DAVID DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUO, GUILIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DERRY, SCOTT DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION IS NOT AT ISSUE $5,893.89 RENT, $502.89 COSTS, $2,226.32 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,623.10, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
